query:
SELECT lc.*, c.phone, c.name, e.name as establishment_name 
FROM loyalty_cards lc 
JOIN customers c ON lc.customer_id = c.id 
JOIN establishments e ON lc.establishment_id = e.id 
WHERE c.phone = '88999290000';
